chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.D-69 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.567/2025 2. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 3. For orders on M.A. No.568/2025. 4. For hearing of bail application. 26.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate alongwith applicant. ******** 1. Urgency allowed. 2. As to the office objection learned counsel requires the office objection overruled as only protective bail for appearance is being sought on urgent basis accordingly for the time being office objection stands overruled. 3. Granted, subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant bail application, applicant Sardar Ahmed son of Nabi Bux Abbasi seeks protective bail in Crime No.15/2025 Police Station, FIA Crime Circle, Sukkur for offence under Sections 409, 420, 468, 471, 34, 109 PPC r/w Section 5 PCA-II, 1947. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant is innocent and has falsely been involved in this case by the FIA Police with malafide intention and ulterior motives. It is further contended that as soon as applicant came to know he tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court for pre-arrest but applicant has grave apprehension of his being arrest before reaching the same at the hands of concerned police hence, he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits and demerits of the case and in order to enable him to appear before concerned Court he is granted protective bail for a period of Seven days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

It is further contended that as soon as applicant came to know he tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court for pre-arrest but applicant has grave apprehension of his being arrest before reaching the same at the hands of concerned police hence, he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits and demerits of the case and in order to enable him to appear before concerned Court he is granted protective bail for a period of Seven days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicant before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicant fails to surrender before the concerned Court within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Ihsan/PS
